title: Lolocorns
description: This mod adds characters from the lololoshka seasons, in the form of unicorns
body:
Lolocorns is a funny mod that adds characters from the Minecraft seasons of the popular Russian-speaking youtuber MrLololoshka in form a unicorns

##  **📥 | How do I install this mod?**

Installing mods is very easy,
1. You must install any mod you want to install
2. Be sure to look at which version you are downloading the mod, mods that go to another version obviously won't run on other versions.
3. Open the folder with your minecraft, and there should be another folder called "mods"
4. Transfer to the mods folder the mod you want to play with
5. That's it! Go to the version you want to play on, and that's it! Also, some mods have dependencies, without which this mod will not start, most often in the description of the mod there is a mod that is needed for the mod to work

and also, if you don't have a mods folder, you have to go to any forge/fabric version, and it will appear.

## ⚙️ | If you have an error!

If you have an error or a question about this mod, you can always contact the creator, me, my discord: retrocrystal

## Other

This mod does not require any other mods, this mod also does not require optifine/sodium.

## 💵 Support | Support me!

You can also [support](https://www.donationalerts.com/r/tr_f0kris) me so that I have the motivation to make other mods!
